author: Jeremy Hou
description: Instantly turns messy AI output into clean Obsidian notes on paste. Removes excessive blank lines, fixes code blocks, headers, removes emojis, and more. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Jeremy Hou
manifest.description: Instantly turns messy text pasted from AI chatbots like ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini into clean Markdown notes. Removes excessive blank lines and emojis, fixes code blocks, headers, and more.
manifest.name: Clean AI Paste

name: Clean AI Paste

## Bug Fix

releases.name: v1.1.1

releases.author: GoSlowPoke168
releases.description:
# Clean AI Paste v1.1.0
This is a minor feature update that brings more granular control over formatting, a much cleaner settings UI, and powerful new troubleshooting tools!

## New Features
- **Debug/Preview Mode:** Added a powerful troubleshooting toggle. When enabled, pasting opens a modal showing the raw clipboard text, the raw clipboard HTML, and the plugin's final formatted output. Perfect for inspecting weirdly formatted AI output!
- **Reset to Default:** Added a quick button at the bottom of the settings tab to instantly restore all toggles to their original states.
- **Granular Heading Controls:** Upgraded "Standard" spacing normalization. You now have two independent sub-toggles to control heading gaps:
  - `Blank line before headings` (Adds space above)
  - `Remove blank line after headings` (Removes the extra space Obsidian natively injects below)
- **Emoji Allowlist:** The Emoji allowlist allows you to preserve specific emojis from being stripped by the plugin.

## Improvements & UI Tweaks
- **Dynamic Settings UI:** Settings are now much cleaner! Sub-options (like the Emoji Allowlist or Tracking Tags) will now dynamically hide themselves if their parent feature is turned off.
releases.name: v1.1.0

releases.author: GoSlowPoke168
releases.description:
# New Features & Improvements
- **New Bypass Setting**: Added "Apply cleanup on bypass paste" (enabled by default) to condense blank lines and trailing whitespace when using Ctrl/Cmd+Shift+V.
- **Fixed Intra-Vault Pasting**: The plugin now detects internal Obsidian copies (<!-- obsidian --> clipboard tag) and does not apply any formatting that would break the text. Fixes all formatting bugs when copy-pasting your own notes, wiki-links, and code blocks within your vault.

# Bug fixes 
- **Supporting More Complex Links**: `unboldLinks` now properly handles complex URLs with deeply nested parentheses.
- **Header Inline Code Protection**: `unboldHeaders` no longer accidentally strips `**` characters from inside code blocks.
- **YAML Frontmatter**: Horizontal rule formatting no longer interferes with `---` frontmatter blocks at the start of pastes.
- **Code Fence Protection**: Added a safety guard to prevent transforms from mangling unclosed code blocks.
- **Inline Math Limit**: Removed the line limit on \(...\) LaTeX conversions so long multi-line math correctly formats to $.
- **Indentation Preservation**: Leading spaces/indentations are no longer stripped from the final output.
releases.name: v1.0.3

releases.author: GoSlowPoke168
releases.description:
### v1.0.2 - Added Hyperlink Clean Formatting

#### New Features:
- Unbolds pasted hyperlinks
- Removes LLM tracking parameters like `?utm_source=chatgpt.com`

#### Other:
- Refactored code to make it more modular
releases.name: v1.0.2

releases.author: GoSlowPoke168
releases.description:
### v1.0.1 - Formatting Fixes & Stability

#### Bug Fixes:
- Fixed `Ctrl/Cmd + Shift + V` to paste without formatting, where the Obsidian keybind was overriding the program.
- Table formatting issues.
- LaTeX formatting issues.
releases.name: v1.0.1

releases.author: GoSlowPoke168
releases.description:
### Initial Release v1.0.0

This is the first release of **Clean AI Paste**. 

#### Features:
- **Blank Line Removal:** Automatically condenses multiple empty lines from AI outputs.
- **Fixes Language Headers:** Automatically detects detached code language labels (e.g., a line reading "Python" floating above a code block) and properly integrates them into the Markdown backticks (```python).
- **Header Formatting:** Strips bolding from Markdown headers for a cleaner look.
- **Smart Bypass:** Use `Ctrl/Cmd + Shift + V` to paste without formatting.
releases.name: v1.0.0
